/usr/bin/cc -static -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/substation_server.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/substation_server.dir/substation_server.c.o CMakeFiles/substation_server.dir/static_model.c.o -o substation_server   -L/home/kali/Desktop/libiec61850/build/src  -L/home/kali/Desktop/libiec61850/build/hal  -L/home/kali/Desktop/libiec61850/build  -Wl,-rpath,/home/kali/Desktop/libiec61850/build/src:/home/kali/Desktop/libiec61850/build/hal:/home/kali/Desktop/libiec61850/build -liec61850 -lhal -lpthread -lm
